rationale: Both reviews identify one real, grounded generality issue in the diff (R1: [Field k] on AffineAlgGroup at l.36/41 can be relaxed to [CommRing k] without affecting its projections; R2: AlgPoints at l.43 is restricted to k-points rather than general R). Acting on either improves generality comparably with no other rubric-relevant differences; all other findings (vacuous True fields, bundling, IsUnipotent) are unrelated to generality.
